$comment: Server-controlled allowlist of bootable Tyde web client versions. This is the AUTHORITY: the loader only boots a version present in `versions` that is not blocked / below minSupported, and it SRI-verifies every artifact listed (entry `integrity` PLUS every path in `artifacts`) before the bundle runs. Phase 6's generator (web/deploy/generate-manifest.mjs) hashes every executable artifact of a version — the entry .js, the .wasm, and any code-split chunks — and merges the real version record below at deploy time.
